headerTitle: AI Forward Deployed Engineer  ·  AI Agent Workflows  ·  Enterprise Automation  ·  Customer Embedding
intro: Zip is building the AI orchestration layer for enterprise procurement — agents and humans moving together across teams, tools, and suppliers. The operating model — embed inside a strategic account, surface the problem, build and ship — is how I have worked across six FDE engagements.
bullets: AI agent and workflow automation — 14 live Claude endpoints (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus routing), webhook-driven pipelines, Zod-validated structured output, HITL approval gates, MCP protocol. Production systems across eight industry verticals.

Six FDE engagements, full relationship ownership — discovery calls with ops and executive stakeholders, requirements translation, implementation, adoption, handoff documentation. Surfaced the next problem before the customer articulated it on every engagement.

Finance and integration workflow automation — Stripe billing automation, invoice pipelines, vendor workflows, financial reporting, and API integrations across Twilio, Google OAuth2, Sinch, and internal data systems. Procurement is a new vertical; the workflow discipline and executive credibility with finance stakeholders transfer directly.
closingLine: Available immediately. Remote US (TX-based), willing to travel for customer deployments.
matchNotes: Strong on AI agent/workflow automation (Claude, N8N patterns live), complex customer engagement ownership, and integration engineering. Procurement domain is the main gap — no formal enterprise procurement experience, but finance/AP workflow patterns and GM-level P&L credibility cover the stakeholder angle.
